calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the Court adoptes its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment, as follows:

Plaintiff Center for Advance Public Awareness's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
